explanations.5: This line assigns a server name from a variable cServerName to the ServerName property of the cData object, which likely represents a database connection configuration.
explanations.6: Similarly, this sets up the database name that the connection will use.
explanations.8: The hardcoded username 'SA' (System Administrator) is being set directly in the code, which is a security risk because anyone reading the source file can see it.
explanations.10: The password is written directly in the source code as plain text, which is a serious security vulnerability—never hardcode passwords like this in production code.
explanations.12: This calls a method on cData that runs a SQL query and pastes the results starting at cell A1 of the currently active spreadsheet, storing the result range in the rng variable.
